reason: The Three.js build renders a complete, legible physics scene: ~50 colorful cubes piled around a clearly tilted ramp on a grid floor, with a live contact count (25), bodies count, and a Reset button — satisfying every required visual evidence item. The Aura3D build shows only the HTML overlay (LIVE CONTACTS 0, BODIES 50, Reset) over an entirely black viewport; no cubes, ramp, or 3D scene rendered at all, and the contact count is 0, so it fails almost all required visual evidence despite compiling and running.
auraFailures: No 3D content rendered — viewport is fully black with no cubes visible
No collision/contact behavior shown; live contact count stuck at 0
Camera framing does not present any physics setup (nothing rendered)
